title: <div>Hey Mike, I hope this message finds you well! It’s Anthony Padavano Jr. As
content:
Hey Mike, I hope this message finds you well! It’s Anthony Padavano Jr. As I mentioned to you at Aunt Sue’s surprise party over the summer, I’m looking for jobs in media. I have a wide range of skill sets; in addition to writing, I have experience in video editing and nearly ten years experience working with audio design/production/mixing.

From what I understand, a lot of writers start out as PAs and then work their way to a writer’s assistant position, but considering my skill sets, in your experience, are there any other jobs that I should look into (entry level or otherwise) as well?

I’d be happy to send you a copy of my resume and some samples of my work if that would give you an idea of what I might be qualified for. If it’s okay, could I send these to [REDACTED:EMAIL ADDRESS]? Just hoping to get your expertise on how I might be able to break into media jobs and what I could do to build more experience, etc. Feel free to give me a call if you’d like to chat. I’m available most nights—I’d love to hear from you!


What sort of jobs do I seem to be qualified for, entry level or otherwise?
context: From document: Hey Mike, I hope this message finds you well! It’s Anthony Padavano… — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)
